summary: Iteration 10: Tested new Backup & Export features. All 23 backend tests passed. Fixed 2 bugs: 1) datetime serialization in backup export, 2) email normalization for imported users. Frontend backup page and article export dropdown both working correctly.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: TypeError: Object of type datetime is not JSON serializable in backup export
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added json_serializer() function to handle datetime objects during JSON serialization

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Imported users could not login due to email case mismatch
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added email normalization (lowercase) during user import

test_credentials.note: Test users prefixed with TEST_iter10_ were cleaned up after tests

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 features all working correctly. Backup export/import and article PDF/DOCX export fully functional.

backup_preview.notes: Returns database statistics (articles, categories, users, documents count). Admin only.

backup_export.notes: Downloads JSON backup file with all data (excluding password hashes). Admin only.

backup_import.notes: Imports data from JSON backup. Supports merge_mode and selective import. Admin only.

pdf_export.notes: Exports article as PDF using reportlab. Available to all authenticated users.

docx_export.notes: Exports article as Word document using python-docx. Available to all authenticated users.

frontend_backup_page.notes: Full backup page with stats display, export button, import file picker, and import options.

frontend_export_dropdown.notes: Export dropdown with PDF and Word options. Downloads work correctly.

api_tests_performed.backup_preview_admin: GET /api/backup/preview as admin returns 200 with stats
api_tests_performed.backup_export_admin: GET /api/backup/export as admin returns JSON backup file
api_tests_performed.backup_import_valid: POST /api/backup/import with valid backup imports data
api_tests_performed.backup_import_user_temp_password: Imported user can login with TempPassword123!
api_tests_performed.full_backup_cycle: Export backup -> Import same backup in merge mode -> all items skipped

ui_tests_performed.backup_page_navigation: Backup link visible in sidebar for admin, page loads correctly
ui_tests_performed.backup_page_stats: Database statistics displayed correctly (articles, categories, users, documents)
ui_tests_performed.backup_export_button: Export button triggers JSON file download
ui_tests_performed.backup_import_input: File input visible for selecting backup file
ui_tests_performed.article_export_dropdown: Exportieren button visible on article view page
ui_tests_performed.article_pdf_export: Als PDF exportieren option downloads PDF file
ui_tests_performed.article_docx_export: Als Word exportieren option downloads DOCX file
